case_title: SEYED MOHAMMAD REZVANI VS. SHANAH UCAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,948.00 FILED BY REZVANI, SEYED MOHAMMAD AS TO DEFENDANT UCAN, SHANAH UCAN, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF REZVANI, SEYED MOHAMMAD
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF REZVANI, SEYED MOHAMMAD AS TO DEFENDANT UCAN, JOSE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF REZVANI, SEYED MOHAMMAD AS TO DEFENDANT UCAN, SHANAH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-10-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UCAN, SHANAH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-10-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO CREDITOR UCAN, JOSE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-11-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE CONTINUED TO JANUARY 9, 2017 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCE ON JANUARY 9, 2017, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. MEDIATED DISPOSITION. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE UCAN WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-09-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SEYED MOHAMMAD REZVANI OR DEFENDANTS SHANAH UCAN & JOSE UCAN. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. THE COURT SHALL DISMISS THE CASE WITH PREJUDICE IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. A SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER SHALL BE PROVIDED TO DEFENDANT JOSE UCAN AT THE JANUARY 9TH HEARING. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED AT INSISTENCE OF LITIGANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REZVANI, SEYED MOHAMMAD AS TO DEFENDANT UCAN, SHANAH UCAN, JOSE
ORDER ON SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER HEARING SET FOR MAY-11-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-19-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SEYED MOHAMMAD REZVANI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHANAH UCAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE UCAN IS NOT PRESENT. THE ORDER OF DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE (CASE SETTLED) IS VACATED AND THE MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-01-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SEYED MOHAMMAD REZVANI. DEFENDANT SHANAH UCAN APPEARED. IF NO APPEARANCES AT NEXT HEARING, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED TO AUG-01-2017 AT 3:30PM IN DEPT 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PER THE JUN-29-17 COURT ORDER IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HRARING DATE THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SEYED MOHAMMAD REZVANI. DEFENDANTS SHANAH UCAN AND JUAN UCAN ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MANI SHEIK; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. NO APPEARANCES (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
